description: A clean public-information graphic identical to the agency's other 'Have you moved?' address-change PSAs. Background is a softly lit, bright photo of a home mid-move: a large open cardboard moving box in the lower-left foreground printed with a simple dark moving-truck icon, additional stacked boxes and a wicker basket in the mid-ground, a sunlit window behind, and a wood floor. Overlaid text at top: 'Have you moved?' in large bold red type, then 'You must notify USCIS of your new address within 10 days.' in bold blue type. Bottom-right shows the DHS circular seal beside the 'U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services' wordmark. Reassuring clean federal PSA aesthetic (red+blue palette). Compliance reminder targeting immigrants/registrants to report address changes. Tweet emphasizes that updating with USPS will not update USCIS and that USPS will not forward USCIS mail.
notable_text: Have you moved? You must notify USCIS of your new address within 10 days.
